I will now organize the files into appropriate folders as noted in the grounding.

Since no specific folder structure was provided, I will create a logical organization:

- Move `.geomconf_7244.xyz.view.json`, `file_log.txt`, and `geomconf_7244.xyz` into this folder.

This ensures all files related to geomconf_7244 are grouped together for better organization.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 15, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
